title: scorzoneroides montana subsp. illyrica
intro: Scorzoneroides montana subsp. illyrica, also known as the Balkan hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Compositae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides montana subsp. illyrica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
